title_zh: 开放模型推动人工智能研究
title_en: How Open Models Are Driving AI Research
summary_zh: 每年，国际机器学习大会（ICML）都会展示成千上万人工智能研究人员的最新研究方向。今年接收的论文显示，开放前沿模型和开放人工智能基础设施已成为现代人工智能科学的基石。NVIDIA在2026年ICML上有74篇论文被接收。
summary_en: Every year, the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) highlights where thousands of AI researchers focus their work. This year's accepted papers demonstrate a clear trend: open frontier models and open AI infrastructure have become foundational to modern AI research. NVIDIA had 74 papers accepted at ICML 2026.
why_it_matters_zh: 开放模型和基础设施推动了AI研究的协作和创新，成为推进人工智能科学发展的重要力量。
why_it_matters_en: Open models and infrastructure foster collaboration and innovation in AI research, making them crucial for advancing AI science.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: How Open Models Are Driving AI Research. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 67.

title_zh: 各国如何部署人工智能以实现战略优先事项
title_en: How Nations Are Deploying AI for Strategic Priorities
summary_zh: 各国长期以来一直投资于国内基础设施，推动经济发展，保护和利用数据，并利用交通、通信、商业、娱乐和医疗等领域的技术机遇。人工智能作为当今最重要的技术，正在加速社会各方面的创新。各国正加大人工智能能力的投资，以实现其战略目标。
summary_en: Nations have invested in domestic infrastructure to boost their economies, safeguard and utilize data, and leverage technological opportunities across sectors like transportation, communications, commerce, entertainment, and healthcare. AI, the most significant technology of our time, is accelerating innovation society-wide. Countries are increasing their investments in AI to fulfill strategic priorities.
why_it_matters_zh: 人工智能提升了各国在关键领域的技术竞争力，助力经济和社会发展，因此成为战略投资重点。
why_it_matters_en: AI enhances national technological competitiveness in key areas, supporting economic and social development, making it a strategic investment focus.

title_zh: PRX 第四部分：我们的数据策略
summary_zh: 本文介绍了PRX团队在数据管理和利用方面的策略，强调如何高效使用数据推动AI模型的发展与优化。
summary_en: This article discusses the PRX team's strategy for data management and usage, highlighting how they efficiently leverage data to advance and optimize AI models.
why_it_matters_zh: 理解PRX的数据策略有助于开发者更好地利用数据资源，提升AI模型性能。
why_it_matters_en: Understanding PRX's data strategy helps developers better utilize data resources to enhance AI model performance.

summary_zh: Hugging Face 发布了🤗 Kernels 的重大更新，旨在提升开发者和数据科学家的工作效率和体验。
summary_en: Hugging Face has released major updates to 🤗 Kernels, aiming to improve the efficiency and experience for developers and data scientists.
why_it_matters_zh: 这些更新将帮助用户更轻松地构建和分享机器学习项目，促进社区协作与创新。
why_it_matters_en: These updates help users build and share machine learning projects more easily, fostering community collaboration and innovation.
